name: Grapefruit and Poppy Seed Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour the ingredients into your bread machine in the following order: yeast, flour, wheat germ, wheat bran, powdered milk, poppy seeds, sugar, salt, grapefruit peel, oil, and grapefruit juice.
3. Set the "baking control" at 10 o'clock on the bread machine dial.
4. Select the "white bread" setting.
5. Press Start to begin baking.
6. In hot and humid weather, use 1/8 cup less water.
